---
title: "Project Overview Portfolio Site"
description: "Designed and built a portfolio website to showcase project work, combining visual storytelling with responsive web design using the Wix platform."
date: 2024-04-01
categories: [Web Design, Portfolio, UX Design]
---

## Overview

Built a professional portfolio website to present and organize project work in a visually engaging, accessible format. The site serves as a centralized hub for showcasing case studies, creative projects, and professional accomplishments.

**View the live site:** [yafeiz.wixsite.com/yafei-zhang](https://yafeiz.wixsite.com/yafei-zhang){target="_blank"}

## Approach

- Designed the site architecture and layout to guide visitors through project narratives
- Applied visual hierarchy and typography (Libre Baskerville) to reinforce a professional, editorial aesthetic
- Built with responsive design principles to ensure usability across desktop and mobile devices

## Features

- **Project showcase** — Dedicated sections for presenting individual projects with context, visuals, and key takeaways
- **Responsive layout** — Grid and flexbox-based design that adapts to different screen sizes
- **View transitions** — Smooth page navigation animations for a polished user experience
- **Accessibility** — Built with browser zoom support and accessible navigation patterns

## Tools & Skills

`Wix` · `Web Design` · `UX Design` · `Responsive Design` · `Visual Storytelling` · `Content Strategy`
